name: Conda Environment
description: Create or update conda environments in the development container.

conda_dir.description:
Path to the conda installation directory.
Leave empty to auto-detect via conda in PATH.

env_files.description:
Paths to conda environment YAML files to create or update.
Separate multiple paths with ' :: '.

env_dirs.description:
Paths to directories to scan for conda environment YAML files.
Separate multiple paths with ' :: '.

env_name.description:
Name of a conda environment to create or update from inline package options.
Requires the 'packages' option to be set.

packages.description:
Space-separated list of conda packages to install into the environment
specified by 'env_name'.

python_version.description:
Python version to use when creating the inline environment specified by 'env_name'.
Example: '3.11'. Has no effect if 'env_name' is not set.

channels.description:
Conda channels to add to the configuration.
Separate multiple channels with ' :: '.

strict_channel_priority.description: Set channel_priority to strict in the conda configuration.

pip_requirements_files.description:
Paths to pip requirements files to install.
Separate multiple paths with ' :: '.
By default, packages are installed into the same environment as each env file.
Use 'pip_env' to override the target environment.

pip_env.description:
Name of the conda environment to pip-install requirements into.
Defaults to installing into each environment as it is created or updated.

post_env_script.description:
Path to a script to run after each environment is created or updated.
The environment name is passed as the first argument.

solver.description:
Conda solver to use. 'auto' prefers mamba if available, falls back to conda.
Use 'mamba' or 'conda' to force a specific solver.

no_cache_clean.description: Skip running 'conda clean' after all environments are set up.

logfile.description: Log all output (stdout + stderr) to this file in addition to console.
